data.title: Preventive Care
data.excerpt: Exams, cleanings, and guidance to keep small issues from becoming big ones.
body: Routine visits are the foundation of a healthy smile. We take time to understand your history, screen for concerns early, and personalize hygiene recommendations you can use at home.
During preventive appointments, we focus on comfort, clarity, and education—so you always know what we’re seeing and why it matters.

seo.title: Preventive Dental Care | Amity Gentle Dental
seo.description: Professional cleanings, exams, and preventive guidance at Amity Gentle Dental.

data.title: Restorative Dentistry
data.excerpt: Fillings, crowns, and solutions that rebuild strength and confidence.
body: When teeth are worn or damaged, restorative care helps you chew comfortably and smile confidently again. We prioritize conservative treatment paths and materials that look natural.
Your plan is explained in plain language—with options, timelines, and what to expect at each visit.

seo.title: Restorative Dentistry | Amity Gentle Dental
seo.description: Natural-looking restorative dental treatments in Amity, OR.

data.title: Cosmetic Options
data.excerpt: Whitening and aesthetic treatments aligned with your goals.
body: Cosmetic dentistry is about alignment between your health and how you feel in photos, conversations, and everyday moments.
We’ll discuss realistic outcomes, maintenance, and how cosmetic choices fit alongside long-term oral health.

seo.title: Cosmetic Dentistry | Amity Gentle Dental
seo.description: Discuss whitening and cosmetic dental options with our team.

data.title: Emergency Visits
data.excerpt: Prompt evaluation when pain, swelling, or trauma can’t wait.
body: Dental emergencies are stressful—we respond with calm triage, clear next steps, and treatment focused on relieving discomfort quickly.
If you’re unsure whether it’s urgent, call us. We’ll help you decide what to do next.

seo.title: Emergency Dental Care | Amity Gentle Dental
seo.description: Get guidance and urgent dental evaluation when you need it.
